description: Designed for utmost comfort, this pair of sandals from fila have all that the feet require. With cushioned, adjustable straps and multi-directional lugs on the outsole, this pair offers ample comfort and stability. But what makes it all the more stylish is the embossed fila branding all along the footbed which is seeped in style and also acts as a foot massager.This range of Tremor sandals from Fila come in shades of black, grey and navy blue. Pair them with casual wear like jeans, cargo pants or shorts and spend the summer in the glory of comfort in style.Upper Heavy cotton canvas upper for support and durability Cushioned, adjustable velcro strap at forefoot and front of the ankle lined with synthetic tape on the outside Cushioned back strap Diagonal synthetic tape connecting the forefoot and ankle strap for snug Fit Midsole Breathable EVA footbed for cushioning and shock resistance Embossed Fila branding all over the length of the footbed Outsole Made of lightweight Thermo Plastic Rubber (TPR) for extra durability, weather resistance and excellent abrasion resistance Multi-directional lugs for stability and grip Midfoot stabilizer running all along the forefoot to the heel counter for added stability and comfort Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
